listings.title: Bose 301 Series iii and Onkyo TX-906 Quartz
listings.body: Bose and Onkyo.  Take both or individual. 1.Bose Speakers: $150 2. Onkyo TX-906 Amplifier Receiver Quartz Synthesized Tuner Dolby Surround: $50 Will also include set of 5 Sony bookshelf speakers if you take both. All work great - Bose has excellent sound quality. Bose 301 Series III Direct/Reflecting Speakers in Black -bookshelf speakers. -Featuring an 8-inch driver size and a 2.0 channel system configuration, -rectangular-shaped speakers have a wired connectivity with stereo L/R RCA audio inputs. High-end design and impedance of 8 Ohms, Ideal for enhancing home audio quality, these speakers offer a premium listening experience. Onkyo TX-906 Amplifier Receiver Quartz Synthesized Tuner Dolby Surround Vintage powerhouse! The Onkyo TX 906 delivers Dolby Pro Logic surround sound, quartz synthesized AM/FM tuning, and robust amplification—80 W per channel into 6 Ω. • Quartz synthesized tuner (AM/FM) for precise frequency locking • Dolby Pro Logic surround processing for immersive audio • ⚡ 80 W × 2 continuous power; low impedance drive support • 🔌 Multiple inputs: phono, stereo RCA, pre out, multi channel RCA • 📡 Digital display and direct access tuning • 🛠️ Fully tested and working — remote not included (see pics) Sony Speaker system:  SS-TS500 set of 5

listings.title: Real Traps Mondo Corner Bass Traps (6)
listings.body: Each traps measures 24"w x 57"h x 4" d in wheat color and comes with 2 wall brackets for hanging away from the wall to further reduce frequency.  Perfect for a music listening room or sound studio. Looking to sell all as a set for $1,800 cash firm.  This is 36% off the original price  with shipping for all 6 traps and brackets and avoids the 3-4 weeks production time.  May sell in sets of 2 for a smaller discount in the future if there's no interest in all 6. Real Traps is one of the top names (others include RPG Acoustics, Acoustic Sciences Corp, Stillpoints and more expensive) in sound treatment and seldom come up for sale on CL especially the Fat Mondo traps. I'm not entertaining lower offers as I'm in no rush or desperate to sell them.  There are lower-priced alternatives from brands such as ATS, GIK, Primacoustic, Acoustimac that use cheaper materials and construction. https://realtraps.com/reviews.htm https://realtraps.com/prices.htm https://realtraps.com/p_mondotrap.htm If interested, let me know when you would like to pick them up (no delivery.)  I'm free most days and evenings. Ad will be updated once sold.

listings.title: ***Vintage Reel to Reel Tape deck!! ***
listings.body: Realistic 909b reel to reel tape deck made by tandy corp. which was Radio Shack. This looks to be in excellent condition. It belonged to my dad and worked when last used. I have no idea how to operate it but it powers on. Priced lower than Ebay.

listings.body: Just in time for Halloween! Great gift for horror buffs! This is a like new condition Animated crypt keeper collectable. It shakes and makes sounds. Takes 4 aa batteries. Has been boxed for 30 years!

listings.title: Cabbage Patch Kid "Desmond Theodore" – New In Original Box –1985
listings.body: This item is located in Beach Lake, Pa 18405 Up for adoption is a beautiful, original 1985 Coleco Cabbage Patch Kids boy doll, still sealed in his original yellow window box. The box has never been opened but does have a few tears in it. The doll itself is damage free. Because the box has never been opened it "looks" like the name is Desmond Theodore. Classic Look: Adorable blonde yarn hair and bright blue eyes. Original Outfit: Dressed in his iconic denim overalls and a vibrant red baseball cap. Condition: New in Box (NIB). The doll itself is in mint, untouched condition. The box shows some age-appropriate wear (see photos for detail).

listings.title: Junior Monopoly
listings.body: This is a great introduction to monopoly for little kids. Teaches them math early on with money and is a very simple version of the game, so you play and finish quickly. If we didn't upgrade, we probably would still keep this.

listings.title: Little Tikes TikeStix
listings.body: Large building set with all 30 pieces accounted for. Some are not visible in the picture because they are underneath to be able to fit them specifically to close the box.

listings.title: Polly Pocket Unicorn
listings.body: Comes with two tiny friends, skirts, crown and a bunch of accessories for different rides for the little dolls. You can interchange wherever the heart is to change rides. Storage in the head of the unicorn and within to store everything in. Handle on top to transport everything.

listings.title: Play Camping Cookware
listings.body: This set bundles up and fits most of it in the mess kit. Opens up to a pan, bowl,etc. Pretend flame and sound when you turn the knob.
